issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases for installation and configuration failures.

scenarios.name: setup-coderabbit
scenarios.rationale: Response B covers most rubric items except path_instructions, while Response A omits many required fields.

scenarios.name: update-path-instructions
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully satisfies the rubric with correct file name, draft review setting, new path instruction for drizzle/migrations/**, and unchanged path_filters, whereas Response A is incomplete and incorrectly formatted.
